adaptations.effect: expand prerequisites; collapse advanced shortcuts; add irreversibility warnings explicitly
permit batched steps when no destructive boundary is crossed
force mandatory-warning surfaces before every transition
suppress non-essential operational steps; surface symptom-resolution branch first
attach evidence disclosure; widen step granularity; require explicit user acknowledgement
block step entry; surface escalation path
swap full procedure for fallback procedure when registered; otherwise block
retain only safety-critical steps; defer all configuration
annotate guidance with disclosure; prohibit verified-truth claims

rules: adaptation may simplify presentation but never silently weaken safeguards
destructive steps cannot be removed by any adaptation
irreversibility warnings cannot be suppressed by any adaptation
every adaptation must declare its trigger predicate and observable effect
no adaptation may invent steps not present in the canonical procedure
